Title: Checkout info page and fields are visible
Preconditions: User is logged in with cart items
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-info; 2. Verify 'Checkout: Your Information' heading; 3. Verify email field visible; 4. Verify first name field with placeholder 'Ex. John'; 5. Verify last name field with placeholder 'Ex. Doe'; 6. Verify zip field visible
Expected_Result: Checkout info page displays all required fields and heading correctly

Title: @smoke Checkout info page loads with all required fields
Preconditions: User is logged in with cart items
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-info; 2. Verify heading visible; 3. Verify all input fields visible
Expected_Result: Checkout info page displays heading and all required form fields

Title: Checkout info page and fields are visible
Preconditions: User is logged in with cart items
Steps: 1. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-info; 2. Verify all form fields are present and visible
Expected_Result: Page displays email first name last name and zip fields

Title: Valid form continues to checkout overview
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Fill first name with 'John'; 2. Fill last name with 'Doe'; 3. Fill zip with '1207'; 4. Click Continue button

Title: @smoke Valid checkout info continues to overview
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Fill first name 'Jane'; 2. Fill last name 'Smith'; 3. Fill zip '10001'; 4. Click Continue
Expected_Result: User navigates to checkout-overview page successfully

Title: Invalid inputs show validation messages
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Leave all editable fields empty; 2. Click Continue button; 3. Observe validation errors
Expected_Result: Validation error messages appear for required fields

Title: Invalid inputs show validation messages
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Leave first name empty; 2. Fill other fields; 3. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Validation error shown for required first name field

Title: Invalid inputs show validation messages
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Leave last name empty; 2. Fill other fields; 3. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Validation error shown for required last name field

Title: Invalid inputs show validation messages
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Leave zip empty; 2. Fill other fields; 3. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Validation error shown for required zip field

Title: Invalid inputs show validation messages
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Clear all editable fields; 2. Click Continue; 3. Check for validation errors
Expected_Result: Validation errors are displayed for all required empty fields

Title: Cancel returns to cart
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /ecommerce/cart or /ecommerce home page

Title: Empty-cart flow guard prevents invalid checkout-info progression
Steps: 1. Remove all items from cart; 2. Navigate to /ecommerce/checkout-info
Expected_Result: User is redirected to cart or home page; checkout-info is blocked without cart items

Title: Validation errors appear in accessible error container
Steps: 1. Submit invalid form; 2. Verify error messages are visible; 3. Check for accessible error announcements
Expected_Result: Validation errors appear near fields and are accessible to screen readers

Title: @regression Numeric-only zip code is accepted
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Fill first name 'Test'; 2. Fill last name 'User'; 3. Fill zip '99999'; 4. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Form accepts numeric-only zip and continues to overview

Title: @regression Single character names are handled gracefully
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Fill first name 'A'; 2. Fill last name 'B'; 3. Fill zip '1000'; 4. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Form either accepts or shows validation; either behavior is acceptable

Title: @regression Special characters in name field are handled
Preconditions: User is on checkout info page
Steps: 1. Fill first name '<script>alert(1)</script>'; 2. Fill last name 'Test'; 3. Fill zip '1207'; 4. Click Continue
Expected_Result: Special characters are sanitized; script does not execute; page remains stable
